headline: Does Generac’s AI-Driven Data Center Push and Reiterated Outlook Reshape the Bull Case for GNRC?
summary: Generac Holdings recently highlighted its upcoming first-quarter 2026 results, pointing to stronger portable generator demand and rising shipments to data center customers as key drivers, while reiterating its full-year guidance. Management also emphasized the potential for its data center-related business to approach US$1.00 billion by 2028, underlining how artificial intelligence investments could meaningfully reshape the company’s Commercial & Industrial segment mix. We’ll now examine how...
